Inspection Report text: Gabriela Stradalova +420 724654 265 Items listed below have been removed from customer vehicles by the Mercedes-Benz Service Organization due to different malfunctions. In order to get the failure cause clarified we ask you for a quick investigation of reclaimed parts. Further we need a detailed analysis report, which identifies the exact root cause of failure for every part. We need your statements via QEC-Tool in the Supplier Portal at: https://supplier.mercedes-benz.com. Please, note the deadline shown in the portal after the parts are received. Parts with failures outside your responsibility and that are marked as "vendor return required" have to be sent back to Mercedes-Benz AG, Abl.ST. 541, In den Weiden 29, DE 73776 Altbach, Germany within 14 calendar days after your statement date. Likewise, parts not sent in time (receiving date Mercedes-Benz) will also be considered as accepted. The returned parts must be labeled with the QEC-Tool barcode label. Otherwise they will be considered as accepted. Parts with failures outside your responsibility and that are not marked as "vendor return required" have to be stored for at least 10 weeks. If Mercedes-Benz AG is requesting those parts they have to be returned to Mercedes-Benz AG (address: see above). All analysis must be performed according to "MBN 10448 Schadteilanalyse Feld". You will find this standard in the DocMaster within the Supplier Portal: https://supplier.mercedes-benz.com.
